metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins for BEAM development, infrastructure, document production, and session management

plugins.name: beam-style-guard
plugins.description: Enforces BEAM/Elixir style guide principles via automated checks and on-demand audits

plugins.name: codebase-forensics
plugins.description: Forensic codebase analysis for inherited, undocumented, or post-acquisition codebases

plugins.name: infra-preferences
plugins.description: Infrastructure tool preferences and best practices for Podman, CoreDNS, Caddy, wireguard, and eBPF monitoring

plugins.name: session-wrap
plugins.description: Session wrap-up: summarize work, update memory, log session, and bookmark for resumption

plugins.name: tufte-press
plugins.description: Convert markdown files to Tufte-style PDFs via pandoc + pdflatex
